snp1.6:1.0.91: "Parābhavantaṁ purisaṁ,mayaṁ pucchāma gotama;Bhavantaṁ puṭṭhumāgamma,kiṁ parābhavato mukhaṁ".
snp1.6:1.0.92: "Suvijāno bhavaṁ hoti,suvijāno parābhavo;Dhammakāmo bhavaṁ hoti,dhammadessī parābhavo".
snp1.6:1.0.93: "Iti hetaṁ vijānāma,paṭhamo so parābhavo;Dutiyaṁ bhagavā brūhi,kiṁ parābhavato mukhaṁ".
snp1.6:1.0.94: "Asantassa piyā honti,sante na kurute piyaṁ;Asataṁ dhammaṁ roceti,taṁ parābhavato mukhaṁ".
snp1.6:1.0.95: "Iti hetaṁ vijānāma,dutiyo so parābhavo;Tatiyaṁ bhagavā brūhi,kiṁ parābhavato mukhaṁ".
snp1.6:1.0.96: "Niddāsīlī sabhāsīlī,anuṭṭhātā ca yo naro;Alaso kodhapaññāṇo,taṁ parābhavato mukhaṁ".
snp1.6:1.0.97: "Iti hetaṁ vijānāma,tatiyo so parābhavo;Catutthaṁ bhagavā brūhi,kiṁ parābhavato mukhaṁ".
snp1.6:1.0.98: "Yo mātaraṁ pitaraṁ vā,jiṇṇakaṁ gatayobbanaṁ;Pahu santo na bharati,taṁ parābhavato mukhaṁ".
snp1.6:1.0.99: "Iti hetaṁ vijānāma,catuttho so parābhavo;Pañcamaṁ bhagavā brūhi,kiṁ parābhavato mukhaṁ".
snp1.6:1.0.100: "Yo brāhmaṇaṁ samaṇaṁ vā,Aññaṁ vāpi vanibbakaṁ;Musāvādena vañceti,Taṁ parābhavato mukhaṁ".
snp1.6:1.0.101: "Iti hetaṁ vijānāma,Pañcamo so parābhavo;Chaṭṭhamaṁ bhagavā brūhi,Kiṁ parābhavato mukhaṁ".
snp1.6:1.0.102: "Pahūtavitto puriso,Sahirañño sabhojano;Eko bhuñjati sādūni,Taṁ parābhavato mukhaṁ".
snp1.6:1.0.103: "Iti hetaṁ vijānāma,Chaṭṭhamo so parābhavo;Sattamaṁ bhagavā brūhi,Kiṁ parābhavato mukhaṁ".
snp1.6:1.0.104: "Jātitthaddho dhanatthaddho,Gottatthaddho ca yo naro;Saññātiṁ atimaññeti,Taṁ parābhavato mukhaṁ".
snp1.6:1.0.105: "Iti hetaṁ vijānāma,Sattamo so parābhavo;Aṭṭhamaṁ bhagavā brūhi,Kiṁ parābhavato mukhaṁ".
snp1.6:1.0.106: "Itthidhutto surādhutto,Akkhadhutto ca yo naro;Laddhaṁ laddhaṁ vināseti,Taṁ parābhavato mukhaṁ".
snp1.6:1.0.107: "Iti hetaṁ vijānāma,Aṭṭhamo so parābhavo;Navamaṁ bhagavā brūhi,Kiṁ parābhavato mukhaṁ".
snp1.6:1.0.108: "Sehi dārehi asantuṭṭho,Vesiyāsu padussati;Dussati paradāresu,Taṁ parābhavato mukhaṁ".
snp1.6:1.0.109: "Iti hetaṁ vijānāma,Navamo so parābhavo;Dasamaṁ bhagavā brūhi,Kiṁ parābhavato mukhaṁ".
snp1.6:1.0.110: "Atītayobbano poso,Āneti timbarutthaniṁ;Tassā issā na supati,Taṁ parābhavato mukhaṁ".
snp1.6:1.0.111: "Iti hetaṁ vijānāma,Dasamo so parābhavo;Ekādasamaṁ bhagavā brūhi,Kiṁ parābhavato mukhaṁ".
snp1.6:1.0.112: "Itthiṁ soṇḍiṁ vikiraṇiṁ,Purisaṁ vāpi tādisaṁ;Issariyasmiṁ ṭhapeti,Taṁ parābhavato mukhaṁ".
snp1.6:1.0.113: "Iti hetaṁ vijānāma,Ekādasamo so parābhavo;Dvādasamaṁ bhagavā brūhi,Kiṁ parābhavato mukhaṁ".
snp1.6:1.0.114: "Appabhogo mahātaṇho,Khattiye jāyate kule;So ca rajjaṁ patthayati,Taṁ parābhavato mukhaṁ.
snp1.6:1.0.115: Ete parābhave loke,Paṇḍito samavekkhiya;Ariyo dassanasampanno,Sa lokaṁ bhajate sivan"ti.
